usage: readBumpLocation [-help] <fileName> [-allow_overlap_control {keep_all keep_existing_bumps keep_new_bumps}] [-die_box] [-ignore_route_blockages] {[-frontBump <frontBumpCellName>] [-backBump <backBumpCellName>] [-bump_cell_from_bump_file ] [-force_current_die ] [-checkAlignment ]} [{-backBump <backBumpCellName> | -bump_cell_from_bump_file } [-rotate_bump  -prefix <string>]] [{-frontBump <frontBumpCellName> | -bump_cell_from_bump_file } [-rotate_bump  -prefix <string>] [-stackViaUnderBump <string>]] [-prefix <string> | -bump_name_from_bump_file {true false}] [-checkAlignment ] [-nonFeedthru ] [-feedthru ] [-tsvViaName <string> [-feedthruSize {x y}] [-offset {x y}]]

options.name: -allow_overlap_control
options.description: {keep_all keep_existing_bumps keep_new_bumps} It specifies the overlap control type.

options.name: -backBump
options.description: Create aligned bumps using specified bump cell

options.name: -bump_cell_from_bump_file
options.description: Create bumps with the same bump cell defined in bump file.

options.name: -bump_name_from_bump_file
options.description: Create bumps with the same bump name defined in bump file.

options.name: -checkAlignment
options.description: Check and Validate alignment and assignment

options.name: -die_box
options.description: draw the die bounding box based on the DieBox value in the bump file

options.name: -force_current_die
options.description: The specified bump file is considered as current die bump file. Skip to check if the specified bump file is for current die or adjacent die or a block.

options.name: -frontBump
options.description: Create aligned bumps using specified bump cell

options.name: -ignore_route_blockages
options.description: Allows bumps to be created on route blockages. When this option is specified, the tool ignores checking route blockages when creating bumps.

options.name: -offset
options.description: offset between bump and TSV in x and y direction

options.name: -prefix
options.description: add prefix name for bump during bump creation and bump mapping

options.name: -rotate_bump
options.description: Rotate bumps during bump mapping according to the chip and bump orientation information of adjacent die.

options.name: -stackViaUnderBump
options.description: under front bump stack via name
